old_value: {"id":"smallhold-l6r","title":"smallhold token CLI commands (mint, list, revoke)","description":"Implement admin CLI commands for token management. 'smallhold token mint \u003cusername\u003e --scopes=read,write,follow' generates a bearer token, prints it once (never again), stores SHA-256 hash in DB. 'smallhold token list' shows token metadata without the token value. 'smallhold token revoke \u003ctoken-id\u003e' sets revoked_at.","design":"Token: 64 random bytes, base64url. Store as SHA-256 hex. For CLI-minted tokens, create a synthetic oauth_apps row or use a null app_id. Print token with clear warning: 'This token will not be shown again. Store it securely.'","acceptance_criteria":"Minted token works in Authorization: Bearer header; token is only printed once at mint time; list shows app name, scopes, last_used_at, created_at; revoke immediately invalidates the token","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:05:09Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:05:09Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-z8j","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:05:11Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
